Politics.headline: Bill Cassidy loses Senate primary in another major win for Trump
Politics.detail: Louisiana Senator Bill Cassidy, who voted to convict Donald Trump in his impeachment trial, failed to make the runoff in his GOP Senate primary. This marks another significant victory for Trump as he continues to exert influence within the Republican party.

Politics.headline: David Lammy promises 25% cut in number of children jailed while they await trial
Politics.detail: David Lammy has pledged to reduce the number of children held in custody before their trials by 25%. This announcement comes as part of a broader effort to reform the UK's youth justice system.

Politics.headline: Cuba stockpiles drones and creates list of US targets, report says
Politics.detail: A recent report indicates that Cuba has been accumulating drones and compiling a list of potential targets within the United States. This development raises concerns about potential security threats and escalating tensions between the two nations.

Politics.headline: Hundreds of millions of dollars for Trump's ballroom ruled out of order in Senate
Politics.detail: The Senate parliamentarian has ruled that hundreds of millions of dollars allocated for the construction of a new ballroom at the White House are out of order. This decision halts the project's progress and sparks further debate over its funding.

Politics.headline: Carney unveils plan to double Canada's electricity grid by 2050
Politics.detail: Prime Minister Carney has revealed a strategy to double Canada's electricity grid capacity by the year 2050. The plan aims to support the country's growing energy needs and transition towards a more sustainable energy system.

Finance & Economy.headline: China New Home Prices Fall the Most in 11 Months
Finance & Economy.detail: China's new home prices across 70 cities shrank 3.5% yoy in April 2026, marking the 34th consecutive month of contraction and the sharpest pace since May 2025, underscoring persistent weakness in the property sector.

Finance & Economy.headline: Singapore's non-oil domestic exports (NODX) jumped 24.5% yoy in April 2026
Finance & Economy.detail: Singapore's non-oil domestic exports (NODX) jumped 24.5% yoy in April 2026, marking the eighth consecutive month of expansion and the fastest growth since February 2012, with electronics continuing to grow strongly, supported by robust AI-related demand.

Finance & Economy.headline: Walmart and Amazon compete for rural America with faster deliveries
Finance & Economy.detail: Analysts at investment bank Morgan Stanley estimate the underserved market could be worth up to $1 trillion in annual sales.

Finance & Economy.headline: Retail sales growth slowed in April as Iran war fuels higher gas prices
Finance & Economy.detail: Retail sales rose 0.5% in April, a slowdown from the revised growth level of 1.6% in March, according to Commerce Department data released Thursday. March marked the largest one-month increase in retail spending in more than three years.

Finance & Economy.headline: Long Island Rail Road strike halts service for 300,000 commuters ahead of Memorial Day
Finance & Economy.detail: Thousands of Long Island Rail Road workers walked off the job after failed labor negotiations, suspending commuter rail service across the New York region.

Technology.headline: F5 says AI inference now core to business operations
Technology.detail: F5's latest report reveals that 78% of organizations globally are running AI inference themselves, with an average of seven AI models in production, indicating AI has moved beyond pilot projects into routine production use. In Australia and New Zealand, 72% of organizations already use AI for automated operational decision-making.

Technology.headline: Local tech to strengthen naval surveillance
Technology.detail: Acacia Systems, an Adelaide-based company, has collaborated with various entities to develop technology that enhances undersea surveillance for the Royal Australian Navy, improving threat detection and sensor placement accuracy. The project was supported by the state government's Defence Innovation Partnership's Activator Fund.

Technology.headline: Security firm and bank launch new partnership
Technology.detail: Arxis, a security firm, has partnered with Credit Union SA to help the bank comply with increasing regulatory standards and address cyber risks, with businesses facing approximately $39,000 in costs due to cyber incidents. The partnership aims to modernize Credit Union SA's technology environment.

Technology.headline: Zetron opens demo suite to showcase critical communications technology
Technology.detail: Zetron has introduced a customer demo suite at its Hull offices, providing a space for public safety and critical communications organizations to test and explore Zetron's solutions. The suite will act as a hub for customer engagement, featuring live demonstrations and hands-on training across Zetron's portfolio, replicating real-world control room environments.

Technology.headline: ASML to partner with India's Tata Electronics
Technology.detail: ASML Holding NV has partnered with Tata Electronics to enhance India's domestic chip-manufacturing capabilities, with ASML's technology powering Tata Electronics' planned semiconductor foundry in Gujarat. The partnership coincides with Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi's visit to the Netherlands, aiming to strengthen bilateral relations.

Science.headline: Cricket pitch-sized asteroid to approach Earth on Monday
Science.detail: A small asteroid called 2026 JH2, roughly the width of a cricket pitch, will fly past Earth on May 18, 2026, at a distance closer than the Moon. Here is everything you need to know about the spectacular close encounter.

Science.headline: Newly spotted asteroid 2026 JH2 to fly past Earth
Science.detail: Newly spotted asteroid 2026 JH2, which could be up to 115 feet wide, will fly past Earth closer than some satellites on Monday (May 18). The close approach will be visible to stargazers and can be viewed via livestream.

Science.headline: Antarctic Sea Ice Enters 'Shock' Decline as Ocean Heat Breaks Through
Science.detail: Antarctic Sea Ice Enters 'Shock' Decline as Ocean Heat Breaks Through. This was published 6 hours ago.

Science.headline: Scientists Gave People Wings in VR, And It Triggered Changes in The Brain
Science.detail: Scientists Gave People Wings in VR, And It Triggered Changes in The Brain. This was published 10 hours ago.

Science.headline: Ancient Roman Technique Discovered 8,000 Years Earlier, Study Says
Science.detail: Ancient Roman Technique Discovered 8,000 Years Earlier, Study Says. This was published 13 hours ago.

Health.headline: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in Congo, Uganda a global health emergency
Health.detail: The World Health Organization has declared the Ebola outbreak in Congo and Uganda, caused by the rare Bundibugyo virus, a public health emergency of international concern after more than 300 suspected cases and 88 deaths. The outbreak does not meet the criteria of a pandemic like COVID-19, and the WHO advises against border closures.

Health.headline: Declare climate crisis a global public health emergency, experts tell WHO
Health.detail: Experts are urging the World Health Organization to declare the climate crisis a global public health emergency. The call comes amid increasing evidence of the detrimental impacts of climate change on human health worldwide.

Health.headline: Scientists Say 8,500 Steps a Day Could Stop Weight from Creeping Back
Health.detail: Research indicates that taking approximately 8,500 steps daily may be effective in preventing weight regain. This finding suggests a practical, accessible strategy for managing weight and promoting overall health.

Health.headline: Wealth and health divide: Obesity rates plateau in rich nations but surge in developing world
Health.detail: Obesity rates are stabilizing in wealthier nations, while they are rapidly increasing in developing countries. This disparity highlights the influence of socioeconomic factors on public health and access to resources promoting healthy lifestyles.

Health.headline: New nanotechnology treatment reversed Alzheimer's symptoms in mice
Health.detail: A novel nanotechnology treatment has shown promise in reversing Alzheimer's symptoms in mice by restoring the brain's natural cleanup system and clearing toxic amyloid proteins. The specially engineered nanoparticles also helped repair the blood-brain barrier.

Sports.headline: Super import's scoring touch and ability to involve teammates crucial in semifinal series.
Sports.detail: The import player's scoring and playmaking are vital for their team's success in the upcoming semifinal series.

Sports.headline: IPL: Delhi Capitals Dent Rajasthan Royals' Playoff Hopes With 5-Wicket Win.
Sports.detail: Delhi Capitals defeated Rajasthan Royals by 5 wickets, impacting Rajasthan's chances of making the playoffs.

Sports.headline: Bangladesh Tighten Grip Over Pak In Sylhet Test After All-Round Show On Day 2.
Sports.detail: Bangladesh dominated Pakistan on Day 2 of the Sylhet Test with a strong all-round performance.

Sports.headline: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi Shatters Another IPL Record, Achieves Sensational Feat.
Sports.detail: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi broke another record in the IPL, achieving a sensational feat.

Sports.headline: Meralco holds off Magnolia in OT, clinches semis spot
Sports.detail: Meralco defeated Magnolia in overtime to secure a spot in the semifinals.

Entertainment.headline: Bulgaria wins 70th Eurovision Song Contest with upbeat party anthem 'Bangaranga'
Entertainment.detail: Bulgarian singer Dara won the 70th Eurovision Song Contest on Saturday with her infectious party anthem “Bangaranga,” giving the southeast European country its first victory in the competition. The event was held on May 17, 2026.

Entertainment.headline: Top Entertainment stories of the week: Tony Leung's farm life; HK celebs and their troubled sons; Mortal Kombat star loves durian
Entertainment.detail: This article summarizes the top entertainment stories of the week, including Tony Leung's farm life, Hong Kong celebrities and their troubled sons, and the Mortal Kombat star's love for durian. One story highlights HK actor Steve Lee Ka Ding accusing his son of exhausting his savings and hiding his ex-wife's death.

Entertainment.headline: 'It's going to be a Drake summer': Reactions pour in on Iceman's triple-album drop
Entertainment.detail: Drake fans were treated to not one but three "frozen" treats with the release of his highly anticipated album Iceman and two additional albums, Habibti and Maid of Honour. The Toronto rapper surprised fans by simultaneously dropping the three albums.

Entertainment.headline: Ann Robinson, 'War of the Worlds' Star, Dead at 96
Entertainment.detail: Ann Robinson, the star of "The War of the Worlds," passed away on September 26, 2025, at her home in L.A., though her family only recently made the death public. She embraced her role as the film's last surviving emissary.

Entertainment.headline: Bea Alonzo, Vincent Co not split but continents apart on wedding day
Entertainment.detail: Despite not splitting up, Bea Alonzo and Vincent Co. were continents apart on their wedding day. The article also mentions other entertainment news, such as Michelle Dee's lawyer lamenting a 'vengeful suit'.

Crime & Justice.headline: Arrest made in terror plot targeting Jewish sites in 3 U.S. states
Crime & Justice.detail: A terror plot targeting Jewish institutions in New York, California and Arizona has been foiled, and a man linked to the alleged scheme is under arrest.

Crime & Justice.headline: Italy car ramming: Several injured after suspect drives into Modena crowd, pulls knife
Crime & Justice.detail: A suspect drove into a crowd in Modena, Italy, injuring several people before pulling a knife.

Crime & Justice.headline: Man shot dead while trying to kill his mom on Mother's Day, Southampton Police say
Crime & Justice.detail: A man was shot and killed by police in Southampton after he allegedly attempted to kill his mother on Mother's Day.

Crime & Justice.headline: Court overturns Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions, orders new trial
Crime & Justice.detail: Alex Murdaugh's murder convictions have been overturned, and a new trial has been ordered.

Crime & Justice.headline: Dutchess County Man Sentenced to 78 Months in Prison for Receipt and Distribution of Child Pornography
Crime & Justice.detail: A Dutchess County man has been sentenced to 78 months in prison for receiving and distributing child pornography.

Education.headline: New curriculum for primary students from 2028
Education.detail: State Minister for Primary and Mass Education Bobby Hajjaj announced that a new curriculum for primary-level students will be introduced in 2028, focusing on language, mathematics, city education, sports, and culture, with curriculum design completed within a year and teacher training in 2027-2028.

Education.headline: Hayah International Academy to launch in Riyadh, signs strategic STEAM partnership with Fulton Science Academy
Education.detail: Hayah International Academy, an Egyptian academic institution, is expanding to Riyadh with a new campus set to open in September 2027, and has formed a partnership with Fulton Science Academy to integrate STEAM expertise into its curriculum.

Education.headline: 500 Bangladeshi students to get free higher education opportunities in Pakistan
Education.detail: Under the Bangladesh-Pakistan Knowledge Corridor initiative, 500 Bangladeshi students will have the chance to pursue higher education in Pakistani universities without tuition fees, which was announced at the Bangladesh-Pakistan Education Expo at Shahjalal University of Science and Technology (SUST).

Education.headline: Fears Thousands Could Fail Under Sweeping NCEA Changes
Education.detail: Concerns are being raised in New Zealand that proposed changes to the secondary school qualification system, NCEA, could lead to a significant number of students failing.

Education.headline: U.S. Department of Education Investigates Houston Independent School District
Education.detail: The U.S. Department of Education's Office for Civil Rights has launched an investigation into the Houston Independent School District.

Lifestyle.headline: PCOS is now called PMOS. What the name change means for care.
Lifestyle.detail: The condition formerly known as Polycystic Ovary Syndrome is now called PMOS. This change aims to provide better care and understanding for those affected.

Lifestyle.headline: Hot, cold, repeat: Contrast bath therapy is the latest wellness trend – how does it work?
Lifestyle.detail: Contrast bath therapy, involving alternating between hot and cold extremes, is gaining popularity in Singapore, prompting questions about its science, safety, and social norms.

Lifestyle.headline: Demi Moore's 'Too Skinny' Look At Cannes 2026 Sparks Concern Online.
Lifestyle.detail: Demi Moore's appearance at Cannes 2026 has led to online discussions and concerns regarding her weight and overall health.

Lifestyle.headline: Tata Sierra EV Launch in July-September 2026 Window
Lifestyle.detail: The Tata Sierra EV is expected to launch in the second quarter of FY27, between July and September 2026, and will be a premium lifestyle electric SUV with two battery choices.

Lifestyle.headline: Models welcome a new wave of maturity on Australian fashion week runways.
Lifestyle.detail: Australian fashion week runways are showcasing a shift towards embracing older models, reflecting a broader movement towards inclusivity and diverse representation in the fashion industry.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: EDITORIAL: China seeks local collaborators
Opinion/Editorial.detail: About a dozen Taiwanese media representatives attended a cross-strait media summit in Beijing where China's Taiwan Affairs Office Deputy Director Wu Xi talked about the agency's expectations for Taiwanese and Chinese media.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Balikatan: Friends and enemies
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The author discusses the joint US-Philippine military exercise of April 20 through May 8, known collectively as “Balikatan 2026.”

Opinion/Editorial.headline: EDITORIAL: A strategy shift to end the global housing crisis
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The editorial discusses the need to address the global housing crisis by looking at the urban setting and the housing issue as a complex problem, noting that nearly 2.8 billion people today live in inadequate housing conditions.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: VP trial: Send out the clowns
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The House of Representatives has performed its constitutional duty by transmitting the articles of impeachment against Vice President Sara Duterte to the Senate, which is now performing an institutional farce.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Beauty and truth are not always the same thing in grief fatigue
Opinion/Editorial.detail: An opinion piece, likely discussing the nuances of grief and how it can distort perceptions.

World.headline: Ukraine war briefing: The drones that bombarded Moscow region
World.detail: A recent drone attack targeted the Moscow region, raising concerns about escalating conflict.

World.headline: At least five people killed in Israeli air attacks on several locations in southern and eastern Lebanon
World.detail: Israeli air attacks on Lebanon have resulted in multiple fatalities and heightened regional tensions.

World.headline: Trump warns Iran: 'The clock is ticking'
World.detail: Donald Trump has issued a warning to Iran amid ongoing tensions in the Strait of Hormuz.

World.headline: WHO Declares Global Emergency Over Ebola Strain With No Vaccine
World.detail: The World Health Organization has declared a global emergency due to an Ebola strain outbreak in DRC and Uganda, which has no approved vaccine.

World.headline: Chelsea appoint Xabi Alonso as new manager on four-year deal
World.detail: Chelsea has appointed Xabi Alonso as their new manager on a four-year contract.

Zimbabwe.headline: Over 70 smuggled vehicles seized in major clampdown
Zimbabwe.detail: Zimbabwean authorities have seized over 70 smuggled vehicles as part of an ongoing effort to combat illegal activities. The operation highlights the country's commitment to enforcing customs regulations and combating cross-border crime.

Zimbabwe.headline: MCAZ applauds police, vigilant members of public in fight against counterfeit and harmful medicines
Zimbabwe.detail: The Medicines Control Authority of Zimbabwe (MCAZ) has commended the police and the public for their assistance in identifying and combating the circulation of counterfeit medicines. Their collaborative efforts are crucial to protecting public health and ensuring access to safe and effective medications.

Zimbabwe.headline: Magwizi Lands Powerful COSAFA Role As Zimbabwe Hosts Motsepe And Regional Football Bosses
Zimbabwe.detail: ZIFA President Nqobile Magwizi was elected to the COSAFA Executive Committee during a congress held in Harare, marking a significant moment for Zimbabwean football as the country aims to strengthen its regional and continental ties.

Zimbabwe.headline: Zimbabwe Hit-And-Run Nightmare Leaves More Than 2 000 Pedestrians Dead Or Injured In 3 Months, Including School Children
Zimbabwe.detail: Over 2,000 pedestrians in Zimbabwe have been killed or injured in hit-and-run accidents in the first three months of 2026, including school children, prompting renewed concerns about road safety and reckless driving.

Zimbabwe.headline: Against all odds, Zimbabwe bets big on diamonds amid global industry challenges
Zimbabwe.detail: Despite challenges in the global diamond industry, Zimbabwe is increasing its focus on diamond mining, aiming to boost its economy through the extraction and trade of these precious stones.
